data.title: BW LPG Limited to release Q4 2025 Financial Report on March 3, 2026. Largest VLGC fleet owner. CEO to lead Earnings Presentation.
data.description: Singapore-based BW LPG Limited, possessing the biggest fleet of Very Large Gas Carriers globally, is set to release its Q4 2025 Financial Report on Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at around 07:00 CET/ 01:00 EST/ 14:00 SGT. The Company's OSE ticker is "BWLPG.OL" and NYSE ticker is "BWLP". An Earnings Presentation will follow the financial report, conducted by CEO Kristian Sørensen and Samanth.

data.title: Unitree Robotics presents "Cyber Real Kung Fu" at China Media Group's 2026 Spring Festival Gala with G1 and H2 robots.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on February 17th, 2026, Unitree Robotics participated for the third time as the official robot partner of the 2026 Spring Festival Gala of China Media Group. The company showcased its G1 and H2 humanoid robots during the event, emphasizing innovation and technology on a grand stage as the new year commenced.

data.title: Basilea exceeded 2025 financial goals with 11% total revenue increase, 15% royalty income rise and tripled net cash position.
data.description: Basilea Pharmaceutica Ltd, a biopharma company, announced its financial results for 2025, with a 11% increase in total revenue to CHF 232.4 million, driven by a 15% rise in royalty income to CHF 111.6 million. The company's net cash position tripled to CHF 86.9 million. Investments in research and development reached CHF 105.9 million, focusing on advancing drugs like fosmanogepix. Basilea aims for double-digit revenue and profit growth in 2026. They are well-positioned for growth with plans to bring new drugs to market and expand their commercial assets. Basilea's CEO highlighted their transformation towards severe infection treatments, aiming for long-term growth and addressing unmet medical needs. A conference call and webcast is scheduled for 4 p.m. (CET) to discuss their financial results and future prospects.

data.title: Baker Hughes and Vallourec sign MoU for hydrogen storage with Delphy solution.
data.description: Baker Hughes and Vallourec have announced a memorandum of understanding regarding underground hydrogen storage through the Delphy Solution. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of both companies to facilitate the development of hydrogen storage solutions. This agreement signifies a significant step towards advancing clean energy initiatives, with an emphasis on sustainable practices. The collaboration between Baker Hughes and Vallourec is expected to accelerate the progress of underground hydrogen storage technology. This MOU underscores the commitment to innovation and sustainability in the energy sector.

data.title: Roche appoints Mark Dawson as the new Head of pRED, joining the Enlarged Corporate Executive Committee on May 1.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Roche (SIX: RO, ROG; OTCQX: RHHBY) disclosed the selection of Mark Dawson, M.D., Ph.D., as the incoming Head of Roche Pharma Research and Early Development (pRED), starting May 1, 2026. Located in Basel, he will assume his role and join the Enlarged Corporate Executive Committee.

data.title: LHV Group's January 2026 results show increased profitability and business volume growth.
data.description: In January 2026, the LHV Group reported increased profitability and business volume growth. The company's financial performance for the month showed positive numbers, demonstrating a strong performance and expansion in operations.

data.title: Sweden offers tourists the chance to own 1 of 5 out of its 267,000 islands known for calm air and nature.
data.description: Sweden is offering tourists the opportunity to experience their dream of owning one of five of the country's 267,000 islands. The islands are known for their serene atmosphere, fresh air, and rejuvenating nature. Applications are now open for those interested in this unique opportunity. This initiative presents a chance for individuals to explore an escape to a private island, embodying the essence of tranquility and seclusion.
